summary: Iteration 99 - Document Lifecycle Validation Engine testing complete. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. All lifecycle endpoints functional: POST /api/document-intelligence/validate-lifecycle/{entity_type}/{entity_id} (validates lifecycle, detects stage/duplicates/inconsistencies), GET /api/document-intelligence/lifecycle/{entity_type}/{entity_id} (returns stored validation with enriched documents), GET /api/document-intelligence/lifecycle-issues (returns non-valid entities with filters). Frontend: /document-lifecycle page with summary cards (Total/Valid/Incomplete/Duplicates/Inconsistent), filters (issue_type/entity_type), issues table, detail drawer with stage progress, missing docs, duplicates, inconsistencies, documents list, re-validate button. DocumentIntelligencePanel shows lifecycle-status-section with validation status, stage, missing documents, duplicate flags. All iteration_98 bundle endpoints and iteration_97 core endpoints still work (regression tested).

issues: Minor React hydration warning - <tr> inside <span> - cosmetic only, no functional impact (same as iteration 98)

seed_data_created.existing_valid_bundle: BDL-B739B77E (customer_order_packet with TEST-BUNDLE-A and TEST-BUNDLE-B) - status: valid
seed_data_created.duplicate_scenario: TEST-DUPPO-1267A3BC (so_draft with 2 Sales_PO docs sharing same PO-DUP-TEST-888 + vendor) - status: duplicate_detected
seed_data_created.inconsistent_scenario: TEST-INC-D838DD86 (so_draft with Sales_PO and Shipping_Document having different customer refs) - status: inconsistent

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 99 - Document Lifecycle Validation Engine fully tested. New endpoints: POST /api/document-intelligence/validate-lifecycle/{entity_type}/{entity_id} (validates lifecycle), GET /api/document-intelligence/lifecycle/{entity_type}/{entity_id} (stored validation), GET /api/document-intelligence/lifecycle-issues (non-valid entities). Validation statuses: valid, incomplete, duplicate_detected, inconsistent, needs_review. Lifecycle templates: so_draft/customer_order_packet -> Sales Order (stages: order_received, order_created, proofing, shipped, invoiced), po_draft/purchasing_packet -> Purchasing (stages: po_created, po_drafted, received, vendor_invoiced), ap_intake_draft/ap_packet -> AP (stages: invoice_received, receiving_support, ap_drafted). Key data-testids: document-lifecycle-page, lifecycle-summary-cards, lifecycle-issues-table, lifecycle-row-{entity_id}, lifecycle-detail-drawer, lifecycle-stage-section, lifecycle-next-action, lifecycle-missing-docs, lifecycle-duplicates, lifecycle-inconsistencies, lifecycle-messages, lifecycle-documents, revalidate-btn, lifecycle-status-section (in panel), lifecycle-panel-missing, lifecycle-panel-duplicates. Activity events: lifecycle_validated, missing_document_detected, duplicate_detected. Test data: BDL-B739B77E (valid), TEST-DUPPO-1267A3BC (duplicate), TEST-INC-D838DD86 (inconsistent).

returns.duplicate_documents: array of {type, reference, vendor, document_ids, message}

get_lifecycle.returns: validation record + documents array with document_id, file_name, document_type, automation_readiness, status

validation_rules.duplicate_detection: Same invoice_number+vendor or PO+vendor across multiple docs
validation_rules.inconsistency_detection: Multiple different customer/vendor references, lifecycle gaps between completed stages
validation_rules.missing_detection: Required stages missing from completed stages

mocked_apis_note: Business Central API operates in DEMO_MODE. Email Service is MOCKED (in-memory). SharePoint storage is MOCKED. Tests seed data directly in MongoDB.
